name: Use of Hard-coded Password
description: The product contains a hard-coded password used for inbound authentication or outbound communication with external components. Hard-coded passwords cannot be changed without patching, affect all installations identically, and are easily discoverable through reverse engineering.
detection_pattern: Look for STRUCTURAL nodes (source code, compiled binaries) containing AUTH data (embedded password literals, credential constants) that flow to AUTH nodes (authentication checks, outbound connection setup) without a CONTROL mediator (external credential store, secrets manager, environment variable lookup) that provides the password from a configurable, non-embedded source.
